scripts.build: bun run prebuild && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --minify && bun run scripts/prepend-shebang.ts
scripts.build:compile: bun run prebuild && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/openslaq-darwin-arm64 --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --minify && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/openslaq-darwin-x64 --target=bun-darwin-x64 --minify && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/openslaq-linux-x64 --target=bun-linux-x64 --minify && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/openslaq-linux-arm64 --target=bun-linux-arm64 --minify
